So the product is dosed at one serving per day, which is two capsules. If you have never taken this product before, I highly suggest that you spend a couple of days taking a single capsule to make sure that maybe that is all you need. Okay? That is doubly true if you're taking this for the first time before any event. If you're taking it like I suggest, like at the start of any new diet where people tend to get a little more stuffed up, then this is a perfect opportunity to get that out of the way so that the next time you take this product, you know exactly what your dosage scheme is. Okay? So when should you take this? You just take this in the morning. You want all the effects of this product to happen during the day if you can stand it. You don't want to have to wake up in the middle of the night if you don't have to. So get all your peas and poops out during the day. Highly recommended. Okay? How? With food or liquid? So just take it how you would your other capsules. Just take it with liquid as much as you need. Cycling this product. Yes, the cycling options are built into this. There is only a week's worth given to you and any given time for a very specific purpose. So again, you might stretch this out between 10 and 11 days if you've never taken it before because you're spending a few days taking one capsule to assess your tolerance. But after that, you're probably only going to do this once, maybe every month. But probably at closer to every two months, you're going to end up cycling this product and usually get for about a week. Okay? What happens if you skip? Do not double your dose. That is not good. Just deal. Plan ahead. Make sure you take it properly. That's all I got.
